read: Price is trapped below the dominant 740 pin after two clean rejections today; IV spiking +7.66 and call vanna force mechanical dealer selling on any rally — the primary fade is 745 on a 740 breakout, and the board stays short-biased above spot into the cash close.

levels.why: Named call wall with the board's largest charm reading (-59k) and massive vanna (+1,679) — rising IV forces dealers to mechanically sell this strike harder than any other above spot, making it the top fade on any 740 break.
First GEX wall above 740 ($480M and building fast, d_gex +252M) — not a named wall but the immediate mechanical stop before price targets 745 on a breakout.
Extreme charm (-114k) and board-largest vanna (+3,123) make this the dominant backstop call wall; requires ~10-pt rally to reach so it's the far target only if 745 breaks.
Massive combined OI (~100k) with positive charm providing mechanical dealer buying — primary downside magnet if zero-gamma at 737.5 cracks; 735 has no support structure left after today's break.
Zero Gamma / Vol Trigger confluence — below here GEX pinning weakens and selling can accelerate; already reversed once today as resistance so a re-test as support is reduced-conviction.
